General.Name: New City Development Group Limited
General.Description: New City Development Group Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the property development and investment activities in the People's Republic of China. It also sells buses; and offers general management services, as well as engages in operation of lifestyle supermarket retail. The company was formerly known as New City (China) Development Limited and changed its name to New City Development Group Limited in May 2012. New City Development Group Limited was incorporated in 1998 and is headquartered in Kwun Tong, Hong Kong.
General.Address: MG Tower, Kwun Tong, Hong Kong
